specs.title: cp-000: Liveblocks real-time collaboration via SRRoomProvider
cp-001: Zustand state management with systematic-review-storets persistence enabled
cp-002: 15 panel components one per workflow tab
cp-003: 7-stage stepper tracks overall review progress
cp-004: Icon FlowArrow icon displayed next to title
cp-005: Title Systematic Reviews heading rendered
cp-006: Description PRISMA 2020-compliant systematic review pipeline with AI-powered scr
cp-007: Projects load on mount fetches from GET apisystematic-reviewprojects
cp-008: Loading state shows loading indicator while projects fetch
cp-009: Empty state appropriate message when no projects exist
cp-010: Project cards renders one card per project see section 4
cp-011: Grid layout cards arranged in responsive grid
cp-012: Button label New Review
cp-013: Icon Plus icon displayed in button
cp-014: Click action toggles visibility of create form
cp-015: Button position in header area visually prominent
cp-016: Title input text input for review title
cp-017: Placeholder eg Metformin vs Sulfonylureas for T2DM A Systematic Review
cp-018: Create Review button submits the form
cp-019: Spinner loading spinner shown on Create Review button during submission
cp-020: Cancel button hides the create form without submitting
cp-021: Validation empty title cannot be submitted
cp-022: Success navigates to newly created project workflow page
cp-023: Error handling displays error if creation fails
cp-024: API call POST apisystematic-reviewconfig to create the review
cp-025: Title project title displayed prominently
cp-026: Stage badge shows current stage with color coding
cp-027: Paper count number of papers in the review
cp-028: Screening progress percentage of papers screened
cp-029: Progress bar visual bar representing screening completion
cp-030: Click navigates to systematic-reviewprojectId
cp-031: Hover state visual feedback on card hover
cp-032: Progress bar fill proportional to screening progress percentage
cp-033: Paper count formatting correct numeric display
cp-034: SRRoomProvider page wrapped in Liveblocks room provider for real-time collaborat
